title: Compulsion Games, creator of South of Midnight, becomes independent after leaving Xbox and seeks new collaborators
summary: After splitting from Xbox, the studio is looking for development partners and support for future projects.

title: Ubisoft acknowledges its internal crisis and announces a quieter year, while Black Flag Resynced developers face layoffs
summary: The French company implements a selective model and reduces its reliance on major releases, amid cutbacks and a strike in Barcelona.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen arrives with new regions, infinite fast travel, and performance above 30 FPS on Switch 2
summary: The Dark Arisen director defends the new fast travel options and the new director assures that the saga is in good hands after Itsuno's departure.

title: Call of Duty Black Ops 1 and 2 ports on PlayStation are plagued with hackers, and Activision begins to take action
summary: Players report massive presence of cheaters in the remasters, while the company promises solutions.

title: Beast of Reincarnation, the new action RPG from the Pokémon studio, shows its perfect parry mechanic and combat trailer
summary: The game features a parry system that encourages improvement and a new combat trailer, generating expectations among fans.

title: Nintendo is evaluating a possible OLED version of Switch 2 but is concerned about the price, according to several reports
summary: Rumors suggest that the company is considering an OLED screen for its next console, although the cost would be high.

title: Dying Light: The Beast cancels its PS4 and Xbox One versions due to lack of power and memory
summary: The spin-off will not arrive on previous generation consoles, which has generated criticism among fans.

title: Prospects for Xbox are bleak according to forecasts, while former PlayStation employees ask to regain momentum
summary: Industry reports and veteran comments reflect concern about the future of Xbox and mass layoffs.

title: Consolidation in the video game industry reaches its highest point in years, with multi-million dollar deals and legal opposition
summary: Mergers and acquisitions in the sector total $2.3 billion in the second quarter, while US states try to block the purchase of Paramount/Skydance.

title: Glen Schofield, creator of Dead Space, announces his retirement after a long career in the industry
summary: The veteran developer, also known for Call of Duty, says goodbye with an emotional message about the creative explosion he experienced.

title: Far Cry TV series adds Steve Buscemi in a mysterious role
summary: The actor joins the cast of the adaptation of the popular video game, generating speculation about his character.

title: George Lucas defends the use of artificial intelligence in film: 'It's the future, you can't reject it'
summary: The creator of Star Wars compares AI to the arrival of the automobile and states that there is no turning back.

title: Sony faces antitrust complaint in Mexico for eliminating physical format on PlayStation
summary: Mexican users and authorities accuse the company of monopolistic practices after the cessation of physical disc production.

title: Steve Allison, former head of Epic Games Store, becomes business director at Saber Interactive
summary: The executive leaves Epic after eight years to take a high-level position at the development studio.

title: Kingdom Hearts will have a prominent presence at a Disney event next month, although no Kingdom Hearts 4 announcements are expected
summary: The franchise is expected to have a significant spot at D23, but fans should not get excited about a new main entry.

title: Konami confirms the release of Castlevania: Belmont's Curse for Switch in October
summary: The new game in the Castlevania series will arrive on Nintendo's console on October 15.

title: Complete Palworld guides: how to get items and improve your base
summary: Various portals offer tips for obtaining resources like Coralum, Ancient Bone, and Cryogenic Refrigerant in the popular game.

title: Directors of The Witcher 3 and The Blood of Dawnwalker consider a delay of the next generation of consoles positive
summary: In light of rising prices, several developers believe that postponing new consoles would benefit the industry.

title: Unions and workers pressure Rockstar and Xbox to recognize unions and end layoffs
summary: Twenty-two union leaders sign a letter demanding that Rockstar recognize the IWGB union, while Xbox players call for an end to layoffs.

title: Star of the biggest movie of 2026 will talk about Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, while a classic mode is requested
summary: The lead actor of the highly anticipated film will appear to promote the game, and fans demand a mode reminiscent of Black Ops 7.
